title: Sharingan Gate 3 Independent Verifier Output
description: Structured output contract for the fresh-context independent verifier. Passed to Codex via --output-schema and to Claude via --json-schema. The verifier MUST emit JSON matching this schema; the engine runtime rejects non-matching responses, eliminating stylistic 'could be clearer' nits at the source. PARTIAL entries MUST cite a plan criterion verbatim so the downstream groundedness check can verify it appears in the plan file.

evidence.description: Concrete reason the code is a stub/shell (e.g. 'body returns null', 'function is empty').
What was expected and where it should have been.

unmet_acceptance_criterion.description: EXACT text copied verbatim from the plan. The script groundedness-checks that this substring appears literally in the plan file. Paraphrasing, interpretation, or invented criteria are rejected.

concrete_deficiency.description: How the code at file:line fails to meet the copied criterion. Must cite specific behavior, field, method, or value (not 'could be clearer', 'consider improving', 'stylistic'). Qualitative-only reasons are rejected by the groundedness check.
